2001: 7 wins
2002: 8 wins
2003: 8 wins
2004: 7 wins
2005: 3 wins
2006: 5 wins
2007: 13 wins
2008: 7 wins
2009: 5 wins
2010: 5 wins
The highest win count is 13 in the year 2007, which is the top winning season. Therefore, the Prediction Answer of 2007 is correct.
